\[ \text{Opposed-Phase TE} = \frac{1}{2} \times \frac{1}{\Delta f} = \frac{1}{2} \times \frac{1}{220\,\text{Hz}} \approx 2.2\,\text{ms} \]

Opposed-phase occurs at half this period, so at approximately 2.2 ms, the fat and water signals are 180 degrees out of phase.
